```{r}
#| label: Setup
source("../common/load-neoipcr.R")
suppressMessages(load_neoipcr(dev_pkg_path = "../../../neoipcr"))
source("../common/helpers.R")
source("../common/logging.R")
suppressMessages(library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
configure_logging(report = "patient-data-report")

# Under Quarto/knitr, configure_logging() (above) installs an output hook that
# routes R warnings and messages — e.g. from the import_dhis2 fallback in the
# later import/filter chunks — into the unified log channel and keeps them out
# of the rendered report body; those chunks therefore need no `warning: false`
# of their own (adding it back would drop the condition before the hook logs it).

locale <- Sys.getenv("LC_ALL")
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = locale))
localeObj <- parse_locales(locale)[[1]]
sR <- get_string_resources(localeObj)
```

```{r}
#| label: Data Import

patient_id <- params$patientId
department_code <- params$departmentCode

connection_options <- get_connection_options(
  scheme = params$dhis2Scheme, hostname = params$dhis2Hostname,
  port = params$dhis2Port, path = params$dhis2Path)

ds <- neoipcr::import_dhis2(
  connection_options = connection_options,
  dataset_options = neoipcr::dhis2_dataset_options(
    department_filter = department_code,
    include_patient = "full",
    patient_columns = c("id", "sex", "birth_weight", "gestational_age",
                         "delivery_mode", "siblings"),
    include_enrollment = "full",
    include_event = "full",
    include_country = "full",
    include_hospital = "full",
    include_department = "full",
    include_user = "pseudo",
    include_timestamps = TRUE,
    include_notes = c("enrollments", "events"),
    include_test_data = TRUE,
    include_invalid_patients = TRUE,
    include_ineligible_patients = TRUE,
    include_incomplete = c("enrollments", "events"),
    translate = TRUE,
    locale = locale
  ))
```

```{r}
#| label: Filter to patient

patient <- ds$patients |>
  dplyr::filter(patient_id == !!patient_id)

patient_found <- nrow(patient) == 1

if (patient_found) {
  pk <- patient$patient_key

  enrollment <- ds$enrollments |>
    dplyr::filter(patient_key == pk)

  events <- ds$events |>
    dplyr::filter(patient_key == pk) |>
    dplyr::arrange(occurredAt)

  admission <- ds$admissionData |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  surveillance_end <- ds$surveillanceEndData |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  bsi <- ds$sepsisData |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  nec <- ds$necData |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  hap <- ds$pneumoniaData |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  ssi <- ds$ssiData |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  surgery <- ds$surgeryData |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  substance_days <- ds$substanceDays |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  pathogens <- ds$infectiousAgentFindings |>
    dplyr::semi_join(events, dplyr::join_by(event_key))

  # `ds$eventDetails` was merged into `ds$events` in the neoipcr
  # schema arc (phase-b-event-details). Entity-level timestamps
  # (`createdAt`, `updatedAt`) and user-attribution fields now live on
  # `events` directly; downstream code reads them off `events`.

  department <- ds$metadata$departments |>
    dplyr::filter(department_key == patient$department_key)

  hospital <- ds$metadata$hospitals |>
    dplyr::filter(hospital_key == patient$hospital_key)
}
```
